summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SP630E RGBWW LED Controller Phase 6 - Planted Aquarium Modes Panel. All backend APIs working perfectly (10/10). Frontend demo mode and all 7 tabs functional. New planted aquarium modes panel with 11 scientifically researched modes working flawlessly. Both categories ('Bitkili Akvaryum' with 6 modes and 'Görüntüleme' with 5 modes) fully operational. Mode activation, AKTİF badges, and fine-tuning sliders (İNCE AYAR) with 5 channels all working correctly. Each mode displays proper color preview, descriptions, tags, and science notes.
passed_tests: All CRUD operations (presets, schedules) working perfectly
Demo mode activation via bottom link
All 7 tabs navigation (control, modes, aquarium, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
Bitkili Akvaryum category - 6/6 modes found (max_growth, balanced_growth, red_plants, carpet_plants, low_tech, algae_control)
Görüntüleme category - 5/5 modes found (natural_daylight, vivid_colors, warm_ambiance, moonlight_blue, feeding)
Fine-tuning sliders ('İNCE AYAR') with 5 channels (Kırmızı, Yeşil, Mavi, Sıcak B., Soğuk B.)
Color preview display for each mode
Mode descriptions and scientific notes display
Tags display for each mode (CO2, Yüksek Işık, etc.)
Channel values display (K, Y, M, SB, SoB percentages)
Mode activation notifications ('Besleme Modu modu aktif!')
All tabs remain accessible (control, aquarium, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
